title: Content Loading Pipeline
description: Discovery, loading, and registration of all game content types at startup

phases.label: ContentLoader Initialization
steps: For each ContentType in ContentType.all: create empty Seq<Content> in contentMap[type.ordinal()]
For each ContentType in ContentType.all: create empty ObjectMap in contentNameMap[type.ordinal()]

phases.label: Create Base Content (createBaseContent)
steps: UnitStance.loadAll()  // depends on Items being loaded
phases.note: Each static load() call instantiates content objects; their constructors trigger registration

phases.label: Per-Content Auto-Registration (triggered by constructors)
steps: [If MappableContent subclass] MappableContent() constructor: name = content.transformName(name); Vars.content.handleMappableContent(this)
handleMappableContent(): [check] if name already in contentNameMap → remove from list, throw IllegalArgumentException
handleMappableContent(): [if mod] set content.minfo.mod = currentMod; set sourceFile if null
branching: Name collision? YES → pop from contentMap list, throw IllegalArgumentException
Name collision? NO → register in contentNameMap and nameMap
Content is from mod? YES → tag with mod metadata
Content is from mod? NO → vanilla, no extra tagging

phases.label: Create Mod Content (createModContent)
steps: YES → mods.loadContent()  // triggers mod content constructors, same registration flow as phase 2a

phases.label: Initialize All Content (init)
steps: initialize(Content::init): for each ContentType, for each Content → content.init()
initialize(Content::postInit): for each ContentType, for each Content → content.postInit()
[UnlockableContent.postInit]: set databaseCategory fallback, databaseTag fallback, populate databaseTabs from shownPlanets
phases.error_handling: If content.minfo.mod != null: Log.err(e), mods.handleContentError(content, e); else throw RuntimeException(e)
phases.dedup_guard: initialize() checks initialization set; if callable already run, returns immediately — prevents double-init

phases.label: Load Visual Assets (load) — client only
steps: [UnlockableContent.loadIcon]: resolve fullIcon from atlas (tries fullOverride, type-name-full, name-full, name, type-name, name+1 fallback chain)
initialize(Content::load): for each Content → content.load()  // load sounds, regions, etc.

phases.label: Load Block Colors (loadColors)
steps: For each pixel column i where blocks().size > i:

phases.label: Log Content Statistics (logContent)
steps: Validate ID ordering: for each ContentType array, assert arr.get(i).id == i (throws if out-of-order)

class_hierarchy: Content (abstract): id: short, minfo: ModContentInfo | init(), postInit(), load(), loadIcon(), handleContent() callback
MappableContent extends Content: name: String | transformName(), handleMappableContent() callback
UnlockableContent extends MappableContent: unlocked, localizedName, stats, techNode, uiIcon, fullIcon | unlock(), loadIcon(), postInit(), createIcons()
key_data_structures: contentMap: Seq<Content>[] indexed by ContentType.ordinal() — ordered list of all content per type
contentNameMap: ObjectMap<String,MappableContent>[] indexed by ContentType.ordinal() — name-keyed lookup per type
nameMap: ObjectMap<String,MappableContent> — global name lookup across all types
initialization: ObjectSet<Cons<Content>> — tracks which lifecycle phases have already been applied
temporaryMapper: MappableContent[][] — optional ID remapping table used during save/load
key_conditions_and_branches: Name collision on registration → IllegalArgumentException; content removed from list
Content from mod → minfo.mod set, sourceFile assigned
initialize() already called for callable → no-op (idempotent guard)
Error during init/load for mod content → log + handleContentError (soft fail)
Error during init/load for vanilla content → RuntimeException (hard fail)
loadColors: pixel == 0 or 255 → skip block (no map color)
important_notes: Registration is implicit: instantiating a Content subclass triggers handleContent/handleMappableContent via constructors
Base content must be created before mod content (UnitStance depends on Items)
load() (assets) is client-only; headless servers skip this phase
initialize() is idempotent — safe to call multiple times
ContentType enum order must never be rearranged (save file compatibility)
